hooks.command: cat >/dev/null || true; command -v code-review-graph >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; code-review-graph update --skip-flows --repo "__PROJECT_ROOT__" || true
cat >/dev/null || true; command -v code-review-graph >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; code-review-graph status --repo "__PROJECT_ROOT__" || echo 'Failed to get code-review-graph status'
